import{useState,useCallback}from'react';let globalConfirmDialog=null;export const setConfirmDialogRef=ref=>{globalConfirmDialog=ref;};export const useConfirm=()=>{const confirm=useCallback(options=>{return new Promise(resolve=>{if(globalConfirmDialog){globalConfirmDialog.show({...options,onConfirm:()=>resolve(true),onCancel:()=>resolve(false)});}else{// Fallback to native confirm
resolve(window.confirm(options.message||'Are you sure?'));}});},[]);return{confirm};};
